_comment: ClipForge MCP wiring. Same shape works for Claude Code (.mcp.json / claude mcp add), Codex, and Pi. Copy the 'clipforge' block into your agent's MCP config. Local deploy: use localhost. Operating from your laptop over Tailscale: point CLIPFORGE_API_URL at the Contabo tailnet name.

mcpServers._intelligence_comment: Intelligence/lead-gen is NOT built into ClipForge — connect these existing MCP servers so the operator agent can research + find leads, then push vetted ones in via clipforge.stage_outreach. Enable the ones you want; each needs its own key.
